description: Fix link localization bug (Thai/Chinese viewers thrown back to English on middle-click/copy-link/share/hard-refresh) and align i18n folder layout with the monorepo's next-intl convention.
deviation_notes: S1 was already implemented as src/proxy.ts (Next.js 16 renamed middleware.ts -> proxy.ts) — verified live, marked done with zero new code. S2 (the user-facing fix) shipped: 29 next/link imports replaced + eslint guard + Playwright spec. S3, S4, S5 deferred per user direction (deploy ASAP); S3/S4/S5 are convention/docs cleanup with no user impact and will be re-spec'd as a follow-up track once the pre-existing vitest+next-intl resolver issue (logged as P2 tech debt) is resolved.

sprint.goal: A Thai or Chinese visitor can navigate the entire site without ever being thrown back to English, and the app's i18n folder layout matches the monorepo convention used by primary-advantage and codecamp-advantage.

stories.title: Replace next/link with next-intl Link everywhere
Align i18n folder layout & drop legacy shims
Audit blog content for hardcoded locale paths

sprint.demo_notes: Live verification via kimi-webbridge on dev server: /th (29/31 internal links have /th/ prefix, 2 are '/' or '/th' root — 0 offending; before fix: 31/31 unprefixed). /th/about and /zh/pricing both clean. Build pass, lint pass, i18n:verify pass.
